title: Intex My Baby Float
features: Pre- tested sturdy vinyl.4 air chambers with double-valves.
Diaper style seat with smooth leg holes.Weight capacity: 11kg
This is not life saving device.Dont leave your children unattended while the device is in use.
Brand name: Intex inflatable baby ring.
description: From the manufacturer My Baby Float The Intex My Baby Float is the perfect first time float for your baby. Features a large outer ring and smaller inner ring for added safety and stability as well as a soft pillow backrest and smooth seat straps to ensure that your little one is as comfortable and happy as can be.
